text: Moving from the quiet anticipation of an almost-empty presentation room to the vibrant, stimulating display of ideas in the R+D space, I feel a shift in my being. The emptiness back there invited introspection and perhaps a mild loneliness, while this vivid wall and its medley of texts and screens energise me, sparking curiosity and the desire to connect with the pulse of innovation. Here, I feel both grounded and inspired, as if I'm walking the subtle line between contemplation and creation.
